title: crepidiastrum lanceolatum var. batakanense
intro: Crepidiastrum lanceolatum var. batakanense, also known as Batakan creeping aster, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Crepidiastrum lanceolatum var. batakanense is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
